new_content.name: Ishgardian Restoration (Phase IV)
new_content.description: The fourth and final chapter of the restoration effort, focusing on the construction of a cultural district.

new_content.name: Eden's Verse (Savage)
new_content.description: The Echo has been implemented, increasing maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency by 10%.

new_content.name: The Diadem
new_content.description: Added new gathering points and items for the fourth phase of the Ishgardian Restoration.

new_content.name: Ishgardian Restoration Rankings
new_content.description: A seasonal competition where skyward points are tallied by class for each World.

new_content.name: Battle System (Echo)
new_content.description: Buff applied to Eden's Verse (Savage) instances.

housing.name: Spring Meadow Partition
housing.description: If one wishes to experience the joys of spring, this partition should be just the ticket. Alternatively, one could try stepping outside, assuming that it is currently the correct season.

housing.name: Stuffed Cait Sith
housing.description: Those expecting this stuffed creature to start shouting through a voice amplification device and riding a remarkably burly moogle may be disappointed.

housing.name: Ishgardian Stove
housing.description: Perhaps not quite as stable as one would like, considering that it is likely to contain burning coals and have a pot of boiling liquid balanced precariously on top.

housing.name: Extra-stuffed Carbuncle
housing.description: How much more stuffed could this be? The answer is none. None more stuffed.

housing.name: Carbuncle House Slippers
housing.description: "Don't get me wrong, I like Carbuncles. I just don't want them on my feet, that's all." ─A bemused arcanist

housing.name: Painting of the New Nest
housing.description: A painting of the New Nest based off your own observations.

housing.name: Painting of Featherfall
housing.description: A painting of Featherfall based off your own observations.

housing.name: Painting of the Risensong Quarter
housing.description: A painting of the Risensong Quarter based off your own observations.

housing.name: Painting of the Firmament
housing.description: A painting of the Firmament based off your own observations.
